data.content: Implementation pushed to origin/main at 4a53ed59. Changed src/components/beat-state-overview-matrix.tsx to measure natural wrapped header content and apply the tallest height to every column header; made label, hide control, and count wrapping siblings; made the badge label block-level/full-width with wrap-anywhere. Updated src/components/__tests__/beat-state-overview-matrix-header.test.ts for the new header structure. Verified lint, typecheck, unit tests, build, and Browser measurement: 12 columns, equal 58px header heights, 6 wrapped labels, all badges/text/components contained.
